creator: alex@stangl.us
text:
Typo in category in AFFECTS: line in /usr/ports/UPDATING affects ports-mgmt/portupdate-scan and possibly other users:

20101202:
  AFFECTS: users of multmidia/gstreamer-plugins
  AUTHOR: multimedia@FreeBSD.org

Fix: 

1097c1097
<   AFFECTS: users of multmidia/gstreamer-plugins
---
>   AFFECTS: users of multimedia/gstreamer-plugins
How-To-Repeat: Search for 20101202 in /usr/ports/UPDATING
